creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
(In reply to Craig Leres from comment #24)

Yes it doesn't work with:

1) DEFAULT_VERSIONS=ssl=base
2) DEFAULT_VERSIONS=ssl=openssl
3) DEFAULT_VERSIONS=ssl=openssl-devel

The same issue with Linux. I try to find some free time to do tests with older openssl versions on a Linux VPS to see which one causes the issue.
